top_signals.title: Asia Traders Turn Focus to RBA, BOJ Rate Decisions: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Traders in Asia turned their focus to policy calls from the Reserve Bank of Australia and the Bank of Japan after a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz fueled a relief rally across global financial markets on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Netanyahu and Trump on collision course as U.S., Iran agree to halt war
top_signals.summary: The goals of both leaders remain unmet, with serious clashes remaining between them over Lebanon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
top_signals.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Shipowners Can Test Opportunities as Recycling Supply Tightens
top_signals.summary: Shipowners with older or harder-to-place vessels may have a stronger opportunity to test the recycling market over the coming months, as limited demolition supply continues to support recycler appetite despite weaker steel conditions in some…
